modelResponses.text: The tool is discovered. Now let me run the audit on the demo website using the default URL.

Here is the structured **UI/UX Audit Report** for **https://playwright.dev**:

---

## 🔍 UI/UX Audit Report

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Target URL** | `https://playwright.dev` |
| **Overall Summary** | The site is functional and generally usable, but would benefit from stronger visual information hierarchy and improved accessibility-focused interaction states. |

---

### Finding #1 — Low Visual Hierarchy on Hero Section

| Attribute | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Severity** | 🟡 **Medium** |
| **Location** | Homepage (`/`) — Hero section |
| **Description** | The primary heading and supporting body text share similar font weight and contrast ratios, which reduces scannability and makes it harder for users to quickly parse the page's value proposition. |
| **Steps to Reproduce** | 1. Navigate to `https://playwright.dev`. 2. Observe the hero section above the fold. 3. Compare the visual weight of the main heading vs. the subtitle/description text. |
| **Suggested Fix** | • Increase the heading font size and/or weight (e.g., `font-weight: 800; font-size: 3.5rem`). • Reduce the prominence of secondary text (lighter color, smaller size) to create a clear typographic hierarchy. |

---

### Finding #2 — No Explicit Keyboard Focus Styling

| Attribute | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Severity** | 🟢 **Low** |
| **Location** | Global — All interactive elements (links, buttons, nav items) |
| **Description** | Interactive elements rely on the browser's default focus outline, which has inconsistent visibility across browsers and may be invisible on certain background colors. This impacts keyboard and assistive-technology users. |
| **Steps to Reproduce** | 1. Navigate to `https://playwright.dev`. 2. Press `Tab` repeatedly to cycle through interactive elements. 3. Observe that focus indicators are faint or inconsistent, especially on colored backgrounds. |
| **Suggested Fix** | • Define a global, high-contrast custom focus ring (e.g., `outline: 2px solid #4A90D9; outline-offset: 2px;`). • Ensure focus styles meet **WCAG 2.2 SC 2.4.7 (Focus Visible)** at minimum AA contrast. • Test across Chrome, Firefox, and Safari for consistency. |

---

### 📊 Severity Summary

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| 🔴 Critical | 0 |
| 🟡 Medium | 1 |
| 🟢 Low | 1 |

### ✅ Recommendations Priority
1. **First** — Address the hero section hierarchy (Medium) to improve first-impression clarity and conversion.
2. **Second** — Implement consistent focus styling (Low) to strengthen accessibility compliance.

---

> **Verdict:** The site is in good shape overall. Two targeted improvements—better typographic hierarchy and explicit keyboard focus states—would meaningfully enhance both the user experience and accessibility posture.
